'''âl-k-b-d''' ('''kalakbedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vomit|vomit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vomit|vomit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-k-b-d
|-
! Lemma
| kalakbedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilakbedoko|thilakbedoko]] || [[word:jilakbedoko|jilakbedoko]] || [[word:shilakbedoko|shilakbedoko]] || [[word:kilakbedoko|kilakbedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulakbedoko|thuthulakbedoko]] || [[word:jujulakbedoko|jujulakbedoko]] || [[word:shushulakbedoko|shushulakbedoko]] || [[word:kukulakbedoko|kukulakbedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholakbedoko|tholakbedoko]] || [[word:jolakbedoko|jolakbedoko]] || [[word:sholakbedoko|sholakbedoko]] || [[word:kolakbedoko|kolakbedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlakbedoko|thĂŠlakbedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlakbedoko|jĂŠlakbedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlakbedoko|shĂŠlakbedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlakbedoko|kĂŠlakbedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalakbedoko|thalakbedoko]] || [[word:jalakbedoko|jalakbedoko]] || [[word:shalakbedoko|shalakbedoko]] || [[word:kalakbedoko|kalakbedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalakbedoko|thalakbedoko]] || [[word:jalakbedoko|jalakbedoko]] || [[word:shalakbedoko|shalakbedoko]] || [[word:kalakbedoko|kalakbedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
